name: dockit
title: DocKit - Document Toolkit
description: Fix formatting in Word, PowerPoint, and Excel files
author: zengtianli

commands.name: format-word
commands.title: Format Word Document
commands.subtitle: DocKit
commands.description: Fix Chinese quote pairing, convert English punctuation to Chinese, standardize unit symbols in Word documents

commands.name: convert-format
commands.title: Convert Spreadsheet Format
commands.subtitle: DocKit
commands.description: Convert between Excel (XLSX), CSV, and TXT formats

commands.name: standardize-ppt
commands.title: Standardize PowerPoint
commands.subtitle: DocKit
commands.description: Unify fonts, fix text formatting, and set table styles in PowerPoint

preferences.name: pythonPath
preferences.title: Python Path
preferences.description: Path to Python 3 with dockit installed
